dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 2001 RH: Action for Dental Health Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Kelly of Illinois (for herself and Mr. Simpson) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce
Additional sponsors: Ms. McBride, Ms. Sewell, Ms. Tlaib, Ms. Schakowsky, Mr. Quigley, Mr. Pocan, Mr. Doggett, and Mr. Rutherford
Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
action.action-instruction: Strike out all after the enacting clause and insert the part printed in italic
For text of introduced bill, see copy of bill as introduced on March 10, 2025

form.official-title: To amend the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize a grant program for addressing dental workforce needs.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Action for Dental Health Act.

Section 340G(f) of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 256g(f)) is amended by striking $13,903,000 for each of fiscal years 2019 through 2023 and inserting $15,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2026 through 2030, to remain available until expended.

endorsement.action-desc: Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
